heading: Overview
body:
The `path` parameter is used by the MongoDB Search
[operators](fts-operators) to specify the field or fields
to be searched. It may contain:

- A string

- An array of strings

- A [multi](ref-multi-analyzers) specification

- An array containing a combination of strings and multi analyzer
  specifications

> **Note:** Not all operators can use all the different types of paths. See the
> documentation for each individual operator for details on what types
> of path it supports.
